AgentDocBody.description: Request body for the agent-doc write endpoint.
AgentDocBody.title: AgentDocBody

AgentLogBody.description: Request body for the agent-log write endpoint.
AgentLogBody.title: AgentLogBody

AutoMemBenchmarkRunRequest.description: Request body for running AutoMem benchmark jobs.
AutoMemBenchmarkRunRequest.title: AutoMemBenchmarkRunRequest

AutoMemKvWriteRequest.description: Request body for writing one AutoMem KV value.
AutoMemKvWriteRequest.title: AutoMemKvWriteRequest

DiskMetrics.description: Aggregate disk I/O throughput in KB/s.
DiskMetrics.title: DiskMetrics

IdeaModel.description:
Single parsed idea row returned by GET /api/ideas.

Attributes:
    idea_id: Canonical idea identifier from filename.
    rank: Numeric rank parsed from filename.
    title: Human-readable title derived from heading or filename.
    summary: Summary text derived from markdown content.
    source_path: Workspace-relative source markdown path.
    mapped_project_id: First mapped project ID, if any.
    mapped_project_ids: All mapped project IDs in first-seen order.
    implemented_project_ids: Mapped IDs currently in implemented lanes.
    implemented: True when any mapped ID is implemented for selected mode.
IdeaModel.title: IdeaModel

IdeaPatch.description: Editable fields for one idea markdown file.
IdeaPatch.title: IdeaPatch

MemoryEntryRequest.description: Request body for the agent-memory append endpoint.
MemoryEntryRequest.title: MemoryEntryRequest

ProjectCreate.description: Full project payload required to create a new entry.
ProjectCreate.title: ProjectCreate

ProjectModel.description: Single project entry from docs/project/kanban.json projects.
ProjectModel.title: ProjectModel

ProjectPatch.description: Fields that may be patched on an existing project.
ProjectPatch.title: ProjectPatch

SystemMetricsResponse.description: Full system metrics payload returned by GET /api/metrics/system.
SystemMetricsResponse.title: SystemMetricsResponse

get.description: Read one JSON value from AutoMem KV storage.

put.description: Write one JSON value to AutoMem KV storage.

schema.title: Response Automem Kv Set Api Automem Kv  Key  Put

get.description:
Return idea records parsed from docs/project/ideas.

Args:
    implemented: Filter selector (supports false/true and exclude/include/only).
    implemented_mode: Implemented lane mode (active_or_released or released_only).
    q: Optional case-insensitive substring match over idea_id, title, summary, and source_path.
    sort: Sort field; rank is the default.
    order: Sort order; asc is the default.

Returns:
    list[IdeaModel]: Filtered and sorted idea rows.

schema.title: Response Get Ideas Api Ideas Get

patch.description: Patch one idea markdown document and return the parsed idea row.
